display.purpose: Hero section heading only. Used once per page. Funnel Display at maximum scale.

headline.purpose: Section h2 headings. Primary organizing unit across every content section.

title.purpose: Subsection h3 headings, card titles, FAQ questions, group labels.

body.purpose: All prose content. Max 65-75ch line length. text-wrap-style: pretty applied.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata captions, small identifiers. Manrope 600.

shadows.name: structural-float
shadows.purpose: Header on scroll. The floating navigation pill. Structural, not decorative.

shadows.name: cta-lift
shadows.purpose: Button hover state. Appears simultaneously with scale(1.015). Signals pressability.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Input focus state. Accent-tinted glow, paired with a solid vermillion border.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (header width, border-radius, box-shadow).

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Text-button underline expand — snaps out, eases in. Used for gradient underline width animation at 0.5s.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Short state transitions: opacity, border-color, box-shadow at 0.2s–0.4s.

motion.name: duration-micro
motion.purpose: Link opacity transitions. Fastest response class.

motion.name: duration-short
motion.purpose: Button text bounce animation. CTA micro-interaction.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Primary responsive breakpoint. Nav collapses, card grid single-column.

breakpoints.name: desktop
breakpoints.purpose: Hero switches to side-by-side layout, header max-width applies.

breakpoints.name: max-width
breakpoints.purpose: Content and header maximum container width.

breakpoints.name: header-shrink
breakpoints.purpose: Scroll threshold at which header transitions from full-width to floating pill.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The site's single CTA action. Gradient fill, text bounce on hover. Use once per section maximum.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff5641, #cf0177); color: #ffffff; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Manrope', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: transform 0.4s ease, box-shadow 0.4s ease; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.015); box-shadow: 0 8px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff5641; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Button
components.description: Secondary navigation-level actions. Gradient underline reveals on hover at cubic-bezier(1,0,0,1).
components.css: .ds-btn-text { display: inline-flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; color: #2c2c30; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'Manrope', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; position: relative; } .ds-btn-text::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff5641, #cf0177); bottom: 0.5rem; left: 1rem; transition: width 0.5s cubic-bezier(1, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-text:hover::after { width: calc(100% - 2rem); } .ds-btn-text:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ff5641; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Header
components.description: Sticky header. Full-width at top, floats as a bordered pill after 200px scroll. Glassmorphic treatment.
components.html:
Protolith Labs
ServicesProcessContact
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 1rem; height: 64px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(44, 44, 48, 0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .ds-header__brand { font-family: 'Funnel Display', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; text-decoration: none; color: #2c2c30; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-header__nav { display: flex; gap: 1.25rem; } .ds-header__link { text-decoration: none; color: #2c2c30; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'Manrope', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; opacity: 0.82; transition: opacity 150ms ease; padding: 0.5rem 0; position: relative; } .ds-header__link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff5641, #cf0177); bottom: 0; left: 0; transition: width 0.5s cubic-bezier(1, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-header__link:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-header__link:hover::after { width: 100%; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Contact form field. Drawing Paper fill, subtle border, vermillion focus. Professional tool feel.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Manrope', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #2c2c30; } .ds-input { padding: 0.875rem 1rem; font-size: 1rem; font-family: inherit; background-color: #f5f7fa; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 44, 48, 0.1); border-radius: 4px; color: #2c2c30; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(44, 44, 48, 0.2); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #ff5641; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 86, 65, 0.05); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #494959; opacity: 0.6; }

components.name: PlusBox
components.description: Signature content zone delimiter. Dashed horizontal borders with SVG plus-sign corner markers. The site's primary structural accent motif.
components.html: Expert-led software consultancy
components.css: .ds-plus-box { position: relative; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(44, 44, 48, 0.1); border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(44, 44, 48, 0.1); padding: 1.5rem 2rem; } .ds-plus-box__icon { position: absolute; width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; } .ds-plus-box__icon--tl { top: -0.625rem; left: -0.625rem; color: #ff5641; } .ds-plus-box__icon--br { bottom: -0.625rem; right: -0.625rem; color: #ff5641; }

components.name: Hologram Card (CSS approximation)
components.description: Service card with 3D tilt and iridescent gradient. WebGL canvas drives the animation at runtime; this CSS approximation shows the static structure and gradient character.
components.css: .ds-hologram-card { border-radius: 15px 15px 0 0; overflow: hidden; min-height: 240px; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f7fa 60%, #e1e1e8); transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-hologram-card__glow { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(120deg, rgba(127,56,220,0.25), rgba(207,1,119,0.25), rgba(255,86,65,0.25)); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s ease; mix-blend-mode: multiply; } .ds-hologram-card:hover .ds-hologram-card__glow { opacity: 1; } .ds-hologram-card__label { position: absolute; bottom: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; font-family: 'Funnel Display', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #07316a; }

components.name: GradientBorder Container
components.description: Content framing container with a masked gradient border that fades from Carbon Ink at the top edge to transparent. Used to delimit sections without visual heaviness.
components.html: Section content here
components.css: .ds-gradient-border { position: relative; border-radius: 16px; } .ds-gradient-border::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -1px; padding: 1px; border-radius: inherit; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, #2c2c30, transparent 70%), linear-gradient(to bottom, #494959, transparent); mask: linear-gradient(#fff, #fff) content-box, linear-gradient(#fff, #fff); -webkit-mask-composite: xor; mask-composite: exclude; pointer-events: none; z-index: -1; }

narrative.overview:
Protolith Labs is built like the software it makes: nothing accidental, nothing gratuitous. The visual system operates from a light, cool-white ground — drawing paper under overhead light — with deep navy providing structure and a warm vermillion-to-magenta accent pair that appears only where it earns its place. The WebGL morphing shader and hologram 3D tilt cards are not decoration; they are the work itself, demonstrating the technical capability that the copy describes. Restraint is what makes these moments land.

The aesthetic rejects both ends of the current market: the SaaS template (hero metrics, identical card grids, 'Scale your business' headlines, pastel illustration libraries) and the dark agency aesthetic (neon purple glows, crypto-adjacent opacity, glassmorphism everywhere). Protolith Labs occupies the space between — considered like Stripe, technically expressive like Active Theory, high craft like Lusion — but quieter than all of them.

Everything ornamental carries a second function. The dashed PlusBox borders delimit content zones and provide grid rhythm simultaneously. The gradient-mask border component signals boundary without heaviness. The corner plus markers become a signature motif — a small, recurring proof of care.
keyCharacteristics: Light ground (cool off-white surfaces), deep navy structure, warm accent reserved for CTAs and active states
Display type in Funnel Display; body in Manrope — authority paired with clarity
Motion is earned: WebGL animations for hero impact, gradient underlines on hover, scale micro-interaction on CTA
Flat-by-default surfaces; elevation appears only as state (hover shadow, scroll header shadow)
Signature PlusBox motif with corner markers, gradient-mask border containers, 3D hologram service cards
Strict light mode; no dark-mode variant currently exists

rules.name: The Two-Stop Rule
rules.body: Signal Vermillion and Catalyst Magenta are not independent colors. They exist as a gradient pair: vermillion to magenta, always linear-gradient(135deg, #ff5641, #cf0177) or the reverse for underline reveals. Never apply either as a flat fill.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The accent gradient occupies 10% or less of any given screen. Its scarcity is its signal. A screen that feels orange or magenta anywhere other than the primary CTA has broken this rule.

rules.name: The Spectral Boundary Rule
rules.body: #7f38dc (Spectral Violet) is hologram-exclusive. It does not appear in buttons, text, borders, backgrounds, or any non-hologram context.

rules.name: The Two-Font Rule
rules.body: Only Funnel Display and Manrope are used. No third font for code, no monospace variant, no decorative additions. Type contrast comes from scale and weight, not family proliferation.

rules.name: The No-Gradient-Text Rule
rules.body: Do not use background-clip: text with a gradient fill for decorative text emphasis. The .gradient-text utility class exists in the current codebase and should be treated as a pattern to retire, not extend.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: If a surface doesn't move, it doesn't have a shadow. Decoration through shadow is forbidden. Every shadow in this system exists because something changed state.

dos: Do use Signal Vermillion and Catalyst Magenta exclusively as a paired gradient (linear-gradient(135deg, #ff5641, #cf0177)). Never as flat fills, never separately.
Do keep the accent gradient at 10% or less of any screen surface. Primary buttons and link underlines are the two valid contexts.
Do use flat surfaces at rest. Shadow appears only when something changes state (hover, scroll, focus).
Do use Blueprint Deep (#07316a) for all heading text and structural anchors. Carbon Ink (#2c2c30) for body text.
Do use Drawing Paper (#f5f7fa) as the universal background for inputs and content containers.
Do let the PlusBox corner-marker motif carry grid rhythm. Place it at section boundaries and container edges, not arbitrarily.
Do include prefers-reduced-motion overrides for any requestAnimationFrame or CSS transition/animation.
Do size body text at 1.125rem minimum and cap line length at 65-75ch for prose-heavy sections.
Do use text-wrap-style: balance on headings and pretty on paragraphs.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing page patterns: hero metrics, identical icon-card grids, stock photo illustrations, benefit-list bullet walls, or any headline built on the template 'Scale/Accelerate/Unlock your X.'
Don't use dark-mode surfaces with neon purple, green, or cyan accents. Don't apply glassmorphism as a default surface treatment.
Don't add border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent on cards, callouts, or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). The .gradient-text class is a legacy pattern to retire, not extend.
Don't add a third typeface. Funnel Display and Manrope are the system's only voices.
Don't apply Spectral Violet (#7f38dc) outside of the hologram card WebGL gradient.
Don't use modal dialogs as a first-thought solution.
Don't stack social proof: no testimonial carousels, no logo walls, no 'trusted by X companies' counters.
